patch_rationale: Add render_scorecard_html.sh + migrate-scores.sh to substrate-registry on-demand allowlist (kind=scaffold) across 3 sibling agent-ergonomics-* skill directories. Both scripts are on-demand CI/operator tools (assets/ci/*.yml invocation; rubric MAJOR version bump migrations) — not continuous. Sister to flywheel-2xdi.60.1 (agentmail-fd-pressure-probe registry-allowlist add). 6 entries because 2 scripts × 3 sibling skill dirs.
design_notes: where field is STRING per flywheel-2xdi.60.1 Design Decision 3 (gap-hunt-probe _expand_registry_path expects str via _walk_for_validator_paths walker)
kind=scaffold is in _ON_DEMAND_VALIDATOR_KINDS = {validator, scaffold-test, self-test, audit, scaffold}
Unique name suffix per skill-dir to avoid collisions in .substrates[] array

Pre-flight: session-shipped flywheel-zsk2d (SKILL.md cap fix) + flywheel-2f4br (command_text rules/slash-cmds extension) already cleared these as FPs via SKILL.md doc citation; this allowlist entry provides STRUCTURAL guarantee against future calibration regressions

verification_post_import.gap_hunt_probe_post_apply: all 6 scripts should be in on_demand_script_allowlist; future probe runs will not flag them
